blocks.title: If-Else Example

blocks.content: Try changing the score value and run the code again!

blocks.title: Login Example

blocks.explanation: The else keyword specifies code to run if the if condition is false.

questions.question: What is the difference between if and if-else?
options: if only runs if true, else only runs if false
questions.explanation: if executes code when true. if-else provides an alternative when the condition is false.
